commands: python -m pytest workpacks/tools/tests/ -k "discovery or roots or exclude" -v
verification.regression_notes: Added multi-root + exclude discovery tests for both lint and file-completeness tools, including missing-root warning + continue behavior.

handoff.summary: Multi-root and exclude-aware discovery implemented and verified.

change_details: Introduced shared scan-target normalization and exclude-aware discovery helpers in workpack_config.py.
Updated workpack_lint.py and validate_workpack_files.py to honor discovery.roots/discovery.exclude with deterministic scan target ordering and warning-on-missing roots.
Added discovery input visibility in CLI output (scan targets and applied exclude patterns).
Added regression tests for multi-root discovery, exclude filtering, and fallback compatibility.
notes: No commit created in this task.
